title: Number of Sub-arrays of Size K and Average Greater than or Equal to Threshold
titleCn: 大小为 K 且平均值大于等于阈值的子数组数目

testcases.input: arr = [2,2,2,2,5,5,5,8], k = 3, threshold = 4 Output: 3 Explanation: Sub-arrays [2,5,5],[5,5,5] and [5,5,8] have averages 4, 5 and 6 respectively. All other sub-arrays of size 3 have averages less than 4 (the threshold).
testcases.expectedOutput: 3 Explanation: Sub-arrays [2,5,5],[5,5,5] and [5,5,8] have averages 4, 5 and 6 respectively. All other sub-arrays of size 3 have averages less than 4 (the threshold).

testcases.input: arr = [11,13,17,23,29,31,7,5,2,3], k = 3, threshold = 5 Output: 6 Explanation: The first 6 sub-arrays of size 3 have averages greater than 5. Note that averages are not integers.
testcases.expectedOutput: 6 Explanation: The first 6 sub-arrays of size 3 have averages greater than 5. Note that averages are not integers.
